2289500.name: FirstResponderVR
2289500.description: Step into the shoes of a first responder and experience the challenge of saving lives in virtual reality! In this realistic and intense VR experience, you will be faced with a selection of emergency situations where quick thinking and decisive actions are crucial. You will be tasked with assessing patient conditions, applying tourniquets, managing airways, and performing other basic but life-saving first-aid procedures. The VR environment will put you in the heart of the action, giving you the opportunity to test your skills and knowledge in a safe and controlled environment. Whether you're a seasoned first responder or just looking to learn more about emergency response, this VR experience will challenge and educate you. Get ready to make a difference and save lives! #VRFirstResponder #SaveLives.
2289500.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
